data.name: label99.Text
data.value: NOTE: The Configuration Tab will NOT display these units, as those are raw values.

data.name: CHK_maprotation.Text
data.value: Map is rotated to follow the plane

data.name: fullScreenHUD2Checkbox.Text
data.value: Full Screen The Secondary HUD On Connect

data.name: fullScreenHUDCheckbox.Text
data.value: Full Screen The Main HUD On Connect
